loop: L99 Agentic Design System + Premium Web OS + Motion Design Studio

visual_asset_decision.public_hero_homepage_png: Rejected as generic AI stock-like imagery.
visual_asset_decision.public_hero_vibe_os_png: Held for possible supporting use, but too neon/purple-heavy for main hero.
visual_asset_decision.chosen: Code-native R3F command core plus existing Oracle presentation proof image.

qa.lint: passed via direct eslint binary with pre-existing unrelated warnings only
qa.mobile_visual: passed: mobile hero/player/layers screenshots inspected, overflowX 0
qa.canvas_nonblank: passed by visual screenshot inspection; WebGL readback returns blank because drawing buffer is not preserved
qa.reduced_motion: passed: route renders with prefers-reduced-motion emulation
qa.suno_embed: passed: iframe present with restored Suno id and direct MP3 fallback

critic_notes: Do not replace the Suno embed with a fake audio control.
Keep the 3D scene as a brand metaphor for command routing, not decorative spectacle.
Avoid purple-blue SaaS dominance; use cyan and emerald with gold as a small premium accent.
Keep Oracle proof, but do not let the portrait become the main homepage subject.
